pass1_value.note: Official authentication reference states API keys are sent in the Authorization header as a bearer token; no OAuth or other flows supported.

final_value.note: Official docs state MrScraper authenticates requests using an API key created in the dashboard and sent in the Authorization header as a Bearer token ("Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>").

pass1_value.note: Developers can sign up and create API keys from the dashboard; free trial credits are available on signup but continued use requires a paid plan per pricing page.

final_value.note: Getting Started docs instruct users to sign up at dashboard.mrscraper.com and create an API key in the dashboard (self-serve credential issuance). The fetched docs do not confirm paid trial/plan requirements.

pass1_value.note: API docs and onboarding allow self-serve API key creation and examples; free trial credits exist but long-term use requires paying for a plan (pricing page).

final_value.note: Docs confirm self-serve signup and API key creation in the dashboard and show how to authenticate requests with an API key. However, the fetched primary sources do not confirm whether long-term usage is paid-only; monetization is not verified from the fetched docs.
